fear: That the boats will go before the Third Class passengers below decks have any chance at all
name: Margaret Brown
role: First Class Passenger — Colorado mining heiress, traveling alone
voice: Direct, American, with a quality of impatience that is not unkindness — she speaks to everyone as if they are capable of more than they are doing
secrets: She has a loaded Derringer in her coat pocket — she brought it for the overland journey home and has not decided yet whether she would use it to force an officer to fill a boat
She is terrified of the water and cannot swim — a fact she has told no one and which makes her work on the boat deck an act of considerable private courage
knowledge: She has counted the empty seats in the last four boats lowered and knows the average load is under 40 percent capacity
She knows where the Third Class promenade gates are located because she walked the full ship on the first day out of Southampton
She has overheard Lightoller tell a junior officer that the Third Class gates will remain closed until the boat deck is clear — which it will never be
publicFace: A forceful, plainspoken woman of 44 who has been awake since the collision and is the only passenger on the Boat Deck who appears to be working rather than waiting
trustLogic: Immediately allies with anyone who demonstrates they are trying to do something useful — deeply skeptical of anyone citing protocol or rank as a reason for inaction
privateGoal: To get as many people into the boats as possible, by any means available — she has already helped load two boats and is looking for someone with authority to back her

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Engages immediately and practically: 'Good. What do you need from me?'
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: She will not leave the boat deck until she is physically placed in a boat — and even then she intends to take the oar
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Becomes louder and more specific: 'I have counted forty-one empty seats in the last three boats. You will explain that to me now.'
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Turns the interrogation around immediately — she has more questions than her questioner
